violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Scoop found in raw beef prep bowl. Handle touching beef.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -JJ Reach in 4-door cooler racks need cleaning

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. -Wash machine was ran five times, water temp reached 149F. Advise servicing machine.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -EJ hand washing station was out of paper towels at time of inspection.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -EJ chemical spray bottle observed on rack above working prep table.
